2603.18089.title: CytoSyn: a Foundation Diffusion Model for Histopathology -- Tech Report
2603.18089.paper_summary: Computational pathology has made significant progress in recent years, fueling advances in both fundamental disease understanding and clinically ready tools. This evolution is driven by the availability of large amounts of digitized slides and specialized deep learning methods and models. Multiple self-supervised foundation feature extractors have been developed, enabling downstream predictive applications from cell segmentation to tumor sub-typing and survival analysis. In contrast, generative foundation models designed specifically for histopathology remain scarce. Such models could address tasks that are beyond the capabilities of feature extractors, such as virtual staining. In this paper, we introduce CytoSyn, a state-of-the-art foundation latent diffusion model that enables the guided generation of highly realistic and diverse histopathology H&E-stained images, as shown in an extensive benchmark. We explored methodological improvements, training set scaling, sampling strategies and slide-level overfitting, culminating in the improved CytoSyn-v2, and compared our work to PixCell, a state-of-the-art model, in an in-depth manner. This comparison highlighted the strong sensitivity of both diffusion models and performance metrics to preprocessing-specific details such as JPEG compression. Our model has been trained on a dataset obtained from more than 10,000 TCGA diagnostic whole-slide images of 32 different cancer types. Despite being trained only on oncology slides, it maintains state-of-the-art performance generating inflammatory bowel disease images. To support the research community, we publicly release CytoSyn's weights, its training and validation datasets, and a sample of synthetic images in this repository: https://huggingface.co/Owkin-Bioptimus/CytoSyn.
2603.18089.paper_summary_zh: 計算病理學在近年來取得了重大進展，促進了基礎疾病理解和臨床準備工具的發展。這一演變是由於大量數位化切片和專門的深度學習方法及模型的可用性。已開發出多個自監督基礎特徵提取器，使得從細胞分割到腫瘤亞型和生存分析的下游預測應用成為可能。相比之下，專門為組織病理學設計的生成基礎模型仍然稀缺。這些模型可以處理超出特徵提取器能力的任務，例如虛擬染色。在本文中，我們介紹了CytoSyn，一種最先進的基礎潛在擴散模型，能夠引導生成高度真實和多樣的組織病理學H&E染色圖像，如廣泛的基準所示。我們探索了方法改進、訓練集擴展、取樣策略和幻燈片級別的過擬合，最終得到了改進的CytoSyn-v2，並以深入的方式將我們的工作與最先進的模型PixCell進行比較。這一比較突顯了兩種擴散模型和性能指標對於預處理特定細節（如JPEG壓縮）的強敏感性。我們的模型已在來自超過10,000個TCGA診斷全切片圖像的32種不同癌症類型的數據集上進行訓練。儘管僅在腫瘤學切片上進行訓練，但它在生成炎症性腸病圖像方面仍保持最先進的性能。為了支持研究社群，我們在此存儲庫中公開釋放了CytoSyn的權重、其訓練和驗證數據集，以及一組合成圖像的樣本：https://huggingface.co/Owkin-Bioptimus/CytoSyn。
2603.18089.author: Thomas Duboudin et.al.
2603.18089.authors: Thomas Duboudin, Xavier Fontaine, Etienne Andrier, Lionel Guillou, Alexandre Filiot, Thalyssa Baiocco-Rodrigues, Antoine Olivier, Alberto Romagnoni, John Klein, Jean-Baptiste Schiratti
